items.title: Palestinians in West Bank and some in Gaza vote in local elections
items.dek: Local elections are held in the occupied West Bank and in one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not taking part.
items.body: Local elections are held in the occupied West Bank and in one Gazan city, though Hamas and other groups are not taking part.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Mali army says armed groups launch coordinated attacks across country
items.dek: Witnesses report explosions and sustained gunfire near a military base outside the capital, Bamako.
items.body: Witnesses report explosions and sustained gunfire near a military base outside the capital, Bamako.
items.author: IriLine Desk

items.title: Seven dead in major Russian attack on Ukraine
items.dek: The city of Dnipro was hardest hit, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.
items.body: The city of Dnipro was hardest hit, with officials saying four died in a strike on a residential building.
items.author: IriLine Desk
